# Chulapa Jekyll Theme

> Chulapa is a flexible, feature-rich Jekyll theme designed for GitHub Pages. It
> enables users to quickly build responsive websites such as blogs, portfolios,
> documentation sites, and project pages.
>
> The theme is built on Bootstrap and integrates multiple tools for search, SEO,
> customization, and content presentation.

## Documentation

- [Read the Docs](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs)
- [Installation](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/01-install)
- [Global Settings](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/02-config)
- [Theming your site](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/03-theming)
- [Layouts & Snippets](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/04-layouts)
- [FAQs](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/05-faq)
- [Markdown
  cheatsheet](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/markdown-cheatsheet)
- [Syntax
  highlighting](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/syntax-highlighting)
- [Variable
  dictionary](https://dieghernan.github.io/chulapa/docs/variable-dictionary)

## Core Capabilities

- Fully responsive design (Bootstrap-based)
- Multiple navbar layouts and UI components
- Built-in support for:
  - Math rendering (MathJax)
  - Syntax highlighting (Pygments)
  - Image galleries (Masonry)
  - Embedded video (YouTube, Vimeo, etc.)
- Internal search options:
  - Algolia
  - Lunr.js
  - Fuse.js
  - Simple-Jekyll-Search
- SEO and social metadata:
  - Open Graph
  - Twitter/X Cards
- Comments systems:
  - Disqus
  - Giscus
- RSS and Atom feeds
- Multi-author support with metadata
- Tag, archive, and index layouts

## Installation Methods

1.  GitHub Template (recommended for new sites)
2.  Remote theme:
    - Add `remote_theme: dieghernan/chulapa` to `_config.yml`
3.  Gem-based installation:
    - Add `gem "chulapa-jekyll"` to Gemfile
    - Set `theme: chulapa-jekyll`

## Configuration

Configuration is handled via `_config.yml`.

Key options:

- Site metadata:
  - `title`, `description`, `locale`
- SEO:
  - `og_image`, `twitter_site`
- Author:
  - name, avatar, location, social links
- Navigation:
  - navbar and footer customization
- Theming:
  - skins and variables
- Pagination:
  - `paginator_maxnum`

## Theming and Customization

- 40+ predefined skins (Bootswatch, custom themes)
- Custom variables via `_config.yml`
- Supports advanced styling overrides
- Sandbox available for experimentation

## Content Features

- Blog posts and collections
- Tag and category archives
- Breadcrumb navigation
- Reading time estimation
- Structured data for search engines

## Typical Use Cases

- Personal blogs
- Technical documentation
- Data science portfolios
- Open-source project sites
- Collaborative/multi-author sites

## Ecosystem and Extensions

- Compatible with Jekyll plugins and Liquid templates
- Supports GitHub Pages deployment workflows
- Can be extended with custom layouts, includes, and assets

## Limitations

- Requires familiarity with Jekyll and YAML configuration
- Advanced customization may require Liquid templating knowledge
- Some features depend on third-party services (e.g., Algolia, Disqus)

## Summary

Chulapa is a highly customizable and production-ready Jekyll theme that balances
ease of setup with extensive flexibility, making it suitable for a wide range of
static websites.
